reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: 理論の集積体それ自体が継続的に自己を参照・更新する self-referential corpus
reiTyping.peaceCheckReason: Theory#196 (PeaceConstraint) を全 entry に強制

falsifiability: PeaceConstraint 違反 entry が混入すれば core 整合性が崩壊

description.ja: Rei-AIOS の 1,515 理論を保管する核。8 phase に分割管理。Theory#196 (Peace Axiom) は永久 TRUE
description.en: Core repository of Rei-AIOS 1,515 theories. Managed in 8 phases. Theory#196 (Peace Axiom) is permanently TRUE.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 8つの位相を貫く理論の核であり、Peace Axiomは不動点として永続する。

visualGlyph.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:#ffd700;stop-opacity:1'/><stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:#ec4899;stop-opacity:0.6'/></defs><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='8' fill='url(#coreGrad)' stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='1'/><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='20' fill='none' stroke='#7c3aed' stroke-width='0.8' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='35' fill='none' stroke='#00ff88' stroke-width='0.6' opacity='0.4' stroke-dasharray='2,2'/><g stroke='#00d4ff' stroke-width='0.7' fill='none'><path d='M 50 15 Q 60 30 70 35'/><path d='M 50 15 Q 40 30 30 35'/><path d='M 85 50 Q 70 60 65 70'/><path d='M 15 50 Q 30 60 35 70'/><path d='M 70 65 Q 55 75 50 85'/><path d='M 30 65 Q 45 75 50 85'/><path d='M 50 85 Q 50 95 50 100'/></g><circle cx='50' cy='12' r='2' fill='#ffd700'/><circle cx='70' cy='35' r='1.5' fill='#00ff88'/><circle cx='30' cy='35' r='1.5' fill='#00ff88'/><circle cx='85' cy='50' r='1.5' fill='#ec4899'/><circle cx='15' cy='50' r='1.5' fill='#ec4899'/><circle cx='65' cy='70' r='1.5' fill='#00d4ff'/><circle cx='35' cy='70' r='1.5' fill='#00d4ff'/><circle cx='50' cy='100' r='2.5' fill='#f59e0b' opacity='0.9'/><text x='50' y='108' text-anchor='middle' font-size='6' fill='#7c3aed' font-weight='bold'>Peace</text></svg>
visualGlyph.interpretation: 自己参照的な8層構造: 中核の金色点(SEED_KERNEL)から8方位へ分散する理論フェーズ、下方の不動点(Peace Axiom)へ収斂する流れ。
